summary: Complete E2E testing of Tu Universidad (Student Universities) feature. Backend: All 14 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 12 UI tests passed (100%). The feature allows students to select university → course → evaluation, generate simulation quizzes, answer questions, and view results with solutions.

issues: LaTeX mathematical formulas not rendered - showing raw LaTeX code like '$16x^3 + \frac{6}{x^3}$' instead of formatted math. Recommend adding KaTeX or MathJax for rendering.

action_items: Consider adding KaTeX/MathJax for LaTeX rendering in quiz questions and results
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints correctly exclude _id from MongoDB responses
Simulation generation properly shuffles options to prevent memorization
correct_answer is not included in quiz response but is included in results after submission - good security
Edge cases handled: partial answers, requesting more questions than available, double submission prevention

test_credentials.test_user: Created and cleaned up dynamically during testing

backend_apis.GET /api/universities: PASS - Lists all active universities with courses_count
backend_apis.GET /api/universities/{id}: PASS - Returns university with courses list
backend_apis.GET /api/universities/{id}/courses/{cid}: PASS - Returns course with evaluations and questions_count
backend_apis.POST /api/universities/{id}/courses/{cid: PASS - Generates simulation with randomized questions
backend_apis.POST /api/universities/simulation/{sim_i: PASS - Submits answers and returns score with solutions
backend_apis.GET /api/universities/simulation/{sim_id: PASS - Returns simulation result if completed

frontend_ui.page_load: PASS - Tu Universidad page loads with 3-step selection UI
frontend_ui.university_selection: PASS - Click selects university and loads courses
frontend_ui.course_selection: PASS - Click selects course and loads evaluations
frontend_ui.evaluation_selection: PASS - Click selects evaluation and shows config panel
frontend_ui.quiz_configuration: PASS - Number of questions selector visible
frontend_ui.quiz_start: PASS - Simulation generates and quiz interface loads
frontend_ui.quiz_navigation: PASS - Anterior/Siguiente buttons and question numbers work
frontend_ui.answer_selection: PASS - Click highlights selected option with cyan border
frontend_ui.quiz_submit: PASS - Finalizar submits answers and shows results
frontend_ui.results_display: PASS - Score percentage with correct/incorrect indicators
frontend_ui.solutions_visible: PASS - Solution text displayed for each question
frontend_ui.action_buttons: PASS - Volver and Nuevo Simulacro buttons visible and functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tu Universidad student feature fully tested. All backend APIs (public, no auth required) working. Frontend quiz flow complete. Note: LaTeX formulas show as raw text - consider adding math rendering library.
